changes.value:
File: kanban-app/ui/src/components/group-section.tsx

The expanded content uses `style={{ maxHeight: "calc(100vh - 6rem)" }}` which is a magic number. This will not adapt to different toolbar heights, window chrome, or nested layouts. If the toolbar or nav changes height, this calc breaks silently.

Suggestion: Use flex-based constraints (`flex-1 min-h-0 overflow-auto`) to let the layout engine handle sizing, consistent with how BoardView and other containers manage their height.
[warning] GroupSection uses hardcoded maxHeight style instead of flex layout
